mechanics.name_guess: Your first tour launched you Up the ladder
mechanics.breadcrumb_path: Rules Compendium > Page 077 > locations > Your first tour launched you Up the ladder
mechanics.excerpt: Your first tour launched you Up the ladder as you ventured into the Free Worids League: Tnere you made contact with Word of Blake Precentor and League planetary official, negotiating contract to supply them with parts for the construction of several new HPG stations: Impressed by such lucky break, Jose sent you to open up markets the Capellan Confederation.
